name: luly-v0-2-6
description: Author Luly flows end-to-end from a single natural-language prompt. v0.2.6: reverts academy lesson exit to default close-icon (luly-app now hard-enforces icon-only topRight); documents 4 border-radius CSS vars (`buttonBorderRadius{,Mobile}`, `containerBorderRadius{,Mobile}`) the renderer reads; story screens within a section must use a single block shape (all image-richtext or all text) — forms/quizzes exempt. Earlier in v0.2: 5-stage pipeline (intake → plan → style → fill → assemble), per-run subdirectory workdir, inline SVG illustrations, brand-fidelity intake, branded placeholder data URIs.
